steps.title: Identify the describing phrases
steps.content: The excavation process is characterized as “hard, physically tiring work” that “can take weeks or even months.” These details reveal what type of process it must be.

steps.title: Match word to meaning
steps.content: ”Difficult” fits because it describes a process requiring hard work and sustained effort. “Cheap” relates to cost (unmentioned), “common” to frequency (unrelated to task difficulty), and “rapid” contradicts the extended timeline. That matches choice D — D is correct.
